meaning: n.色调,样子,颜色,色彩,叫声,大声叫喊,大声反对
examples: This highly visible hue is found on everything from bumblebees to school buses, traffic signs to highlighters.
His face took on an unhealthy whitish hue.
His face took on an unhealthy, whitish hue.
Jerry Brown turned out to be of a very different political hue than his father.
Only 1 in roughly 10, 000 stones has a hue, sometimes caused by trapped elements.
